web.title: The Perfect Vocal Loudness (With Data)
web.description: To get your vocal to sit properly in the mix, it should be between 3 to 6 LUFS quieter than the full track (including the vocal).

web.title: How much louder (dB) should your vocal channel be over ...
web.description: I usually mix my vocal channel in FL Studio around 1dB or 1.5 dB louder than the instrumental. Is that the sweet spot?

web.title: Volume Balancing: Guide to Setting Levels in a Static Mix
web.description: Learn how to achieve perfect volume balancing and set levels for your static mix. Enhance your mixing skills with Avid Sibelius!

web.title: How to set proper vocal levels in your mix
web.description: What level should the vocals be? Tips for setting up vocal levels in mixing 1. Get a static mix going right away 2. Spot-check your work
